ques: Look up the latest research paper related to black holes published in the journal "Nature Astronomy".
answer: "Discovery of quasar variability and early accretion disk signatures at cosmic dawn" by Gene C. K. Leung, Anna-Christina Eilers, et al. — an Article published 08 June 2026 in Nature Astronomy, reporting black-hole accretion-disk signatures in an early-universe quasar.
